name: @telenow/bigcommerce-app
description: Native BigCommerce app: a multilingual AI voice agent that automatically phones shoppers on store events — COD confirmation (RTO reduction), abandoned-cart recovery, order confirmation, delivery/shipping updates, failed-delivery (NDR) retry, instant lead callback, win-back, and review/feedback calls — and writes every call outcome back onto the order. Free app; requires a Telenow account billed on usage.

scripts.dev:preview: npm run dev:seed && BIGCOMMERCE_CLIENT_ID=dev BIGCOMMERCE_CLIENT_SECRET=dev HOST=http://localhost:3000 PORT=3000 node src/server.js
